synopsis: Imperial Admiral Damon Krell launches a prototype infiltrator probe droid at a damaged Rebel blockade runner. The probe smashes through the hull, slaughters the crew, and seizes command of the ship's automated systems, intending to pilot it into the Rebel fleet and detonate. Luke Skywalker's X-wing is destroyed by the runner's guns, so he and R2-D2 space-walk aboard and Luke cuts his way inside with his lightsaber. He cannot tamper with the probe without risking its self-destruct, but the droid recognizes him and, under standing orders to bring Skywalker to Darth Vader alive, redirects its course. Luke has R2 activate a single escape pod and sends a warning to the fleet before they eject. The probe droid diverts the runner back to Krell's Star Destroyer, but with the reactor primed for meltdown, the runner collides with the Imperial ship and destroys them both.
title: Star Wars (1977) #45: Death Probe
